data.title: Hargreave Hale AIM VCT PLC Announces Share Allotment Under Dividend Reinvestment Scheme
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

Hargreave Hale AIM VCT 1 ( (GB:HHV) ) has shared an update.

Hargreave Hale AIM VCT PLC has announced the allotment of ordinary shares under its Dividend Reinvestment Scheme. This notification was made in compliance with the UK Market Abuse Regulation and involved transactions by key personnel and associated individuals, including Justin Ward and Oliver Bedford, both Non-Executive Directors, and Mrs. E Ward. The transactions were conducted on 14 February 2025 at the London Stock Exchange, involving a total of 26,386 shares at a price of £0.3754 per share, with an aggregated value of £9,905.30. This announcement underscores the company’s ongoing commitment to shareholder value through reinvestment opportunities.

More about Hargreave Hale AIM VCT 1

data.title: Lion One Metals Secures $10.8 Million for Tuvatu Gold Project
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

Lion One Metals ( (TSE:LIO) ) has shared an update.

Lion One Metals Limited successfully closed an underwritten public offering and a concurrent sidecar private placement, raising gross proceeds of approximately $10.8 million. The funds will be utilized for purchasing mining and mill equipment and supporting ongoing exploration activities at the Tuvatu Gold project in Fiji. The offering included issuing units consisting of common shares and warrants, with the company planning to list these warrants on the TSX Venture Exchange. These financial activities are poised to bolster Lion One’s operational capabilities and strengthen its position within the mining sector.

More about Lion One Metals

Lion One Metals Limited is a company operating within the mining industry, focusing primarily on gold exploration and development. It is particularly focused on the Tuvatu Gold project located in Fiji.

Average Trading Volume: 307,936

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

data.title: Siemens Energy Announces Change in Voting Rights
data.description:

  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

Siemens Energy ( (DE:ENR) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Siemens Energy AG has released a voting rights announcement under the German Securities Trading Act, indicating a change in the ownership of shares with voting rights. The announcement reveals that BlackRock, Inc., a US-based investment management corporation, has adjusted its stake, resulting in a slight increase in the total voting rights percentage from 5.44% to 5.45%. This change could potentially impact Siemens Energy’s shareholder dynamics, with BlackRock’s increased influence possibly affecting future corporate decisions.

More about Siemens Energy

Siemens Energy AG is a major player in the energy sector, headquartered in Munich, Germany. The company is involved in the production and supply of energy technology, providing solutions across the entire energy value chain, including generation, transmission, and renewable energy sources.

data.description:

Sportradar Group AG ( (SRAD) ) has shared an announcement.

On February 13, 2025, Hafiz Lalani resigned from the board of directors of Sportradar Group AG due to his departure from CPP Investments. CPP Investments has proposed Pascal Keutgens, Head of Direct Private Equity in Europe at CPP Investments since 2019, as a board member candidate, with the election to take place at the company’s 2025 Annual General Meeting on May 15, 2025.

More about Sportradar Group AG

Sportradar Group AG is a company operating in the sports data and technology industry, providing products and services that include sports data collection, analytics, and distribution to various stakeholders in the sports ecosystem.

data.title: SYLA Technologies Approves Share Exchange with CUMICA CORPORATION
data.description:

  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

SYLA Technologies Co., Ltd. ADR ( (SYT) ) just unveiled an update.

On February 14, 2025, SYLA Technologies Co., Ltd. held an Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders where a Share Exchange Agreement with CUMICA CORPORATION was approved. This agreement will make CUMICA the wholly owning parent company of SYLA, effective June 1, 2025, leading to the delisting of SYLA’s American Depositary Shares on May 29, 2025. This strategic move is expected to reposition the company within the industry and has implications for shareholders and ADS holders, who are advised to review the forthcoming procedural details.

More about SYLA Technologies Co., Ltd. ADR

SYLA Technologies Co., Ltd. operates in the technology industry and is listed on NASDAQ under the code SYT. The company focuses on technological advancements and strategic partnerships.

data.title: China Health Industries Delays Quarterly Report
data.description:
China Health Industries Holdings ( (CHHE) ) has released a notification of late filing.

Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

China Health Industries Holdings has announced a delay in filing its Form 10-Q (Quarter Report) for the period ending December 31, 2024. The primary reason for the delay is the time constraints associated with compiling, disseminating, and reviewing the necessary information, which has made timely filing impractical without undue hardship and expense. The company anticipates filing the report within five calendar days following the original due date of February 14, 2025. No significant changes in financial results are expected for this reporting period. The notification ends with ongoing compliance efforts being noted and is signed by Xin Sun, the company’s CEO and CFO.

More about China Health Industries Holdings
